title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BOHÃ IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO SAN ANTONIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1356 / 55 OG No. 38, 8099 (September 21, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2531, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BOHÃ IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASIGURAN, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO SAN ANTONIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio BohÃ³ in the Municipality of Casiguran, Province of Sorsogon, is hereby changed to San Antonio.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
